text: Here, amidst the discussions of process and personal dimensions, I am drawn into reflection. The presence of others, the murmur of purpose, and the carefully structured space evoke in me a subtle sense of possibility mingled with uncertainty. There is anticipation—what process shall we choose, what path will unfold? I feel myself participating in a collective search, quietly aware that the journey is as important as the destination. A delicate tension holds me: connection, intention, and above all, a curiosity about what comes next.
